caption: A man with a shaved head, wearing a blue t-shirt and a white lanyard, stands on a stage in front of a blue illuminated backdrop. The background features repeating logos and text, including "rootconf" beneath a symbol of three vertical bars and the phrase "has geek." To the man's right is a dark podium holding a laptop. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, standing with his arms crossed or partially folded. He looks toward the right side of the frame, subtly shifting his gaze and head position. The lighting remains constant, casting a blue glow from the backdrop onto the scene. The environment is a formal presentation setting, and the man's posture and expression remain relatively steady as he appears to be listening or preparing to speak.
